name: AA_SATIS
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[AA_SATIS] AS



SELECT 
YEAR(F.DATE_) YIL
,MONTH(F.DATE_) AY
,F.DATE_ TARIH
,F.FICHENO FATURA_NO
,C.CODE CARI_KODU
,C.DEFINITION_ CARI_ADI
,S.CODE STOK_KODU
,S.NAME STOK_ADI
,S.CYPHCODE
,CASE F.trcode WHEN 3 THEN L.AMOUNT*-1 ELSE L.AMOUNT END MIKTAR
---,L.AMOUNT MIKTAR

---,L.PRICE FIYAT
,CASE F.trcode WHEN 3 THEN L.PRICE*-1 ELSE L.PRICE END FIYAT
,CASE F.trcode WHEN 3 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END *-1
ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END END TUTAR
--,CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END TUTAR
--,CASE SUBSTRING(S.CODE,1,2) 
--WHEN 'G0' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN' 
--WHEN 'G1' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN' 
--WHEN 'R0' THEN 'RONIN KABINR'
--WHEN 'RX' THEN 'RONIN XL'
--WHEN 'FO' THEN 'RONIN KABINR'
--WHEN 'F0' THEN 'FRERDOM'
--WHEN 'T0' THEN 'TROY'
--WHEN 'MC' THEN 'MOHICAN'
--WHEN 'RV' THEN 'REVIVA'
--WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
--WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
--WHEN 'PA' THEN 'PAN ANATOLIA' 
--WHEN '20' THEN 'AKSESUAR' 
--END TUR
,(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_001_SPECODES WHERE SPECODETYPE=55 AND SPECODE=L.SPECODE2) TUR
,CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=3 THEN 'IADE' ELSE 'SATIS' END FIS_TURU
,(SELECT CODE FROM LG_001_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF) IS_EMRI_N0
,(SELECT NAME FROM LG_001_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF) IS_EMRI_ADI
,l.SPECODE2
---,f.trcode
----
  ,(SELECT        FICHENO
                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFICHE
                               WHERE        LOGICALREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)) [MUH FİŞ NO],

----------------------------------------------
							  
							  
						  --ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

        --                       FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
        --                       WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
        --                                                     (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
        --                                                       FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
        --                                                       WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '6%'),'') [MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU],

															   	  
						  --ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

        --                       FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
        --                       WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
        --                                                     (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
        --                                                       FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
        --                                                       WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '15%'),'') [MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU____],

------------------------------
CASE WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '6%'),'') LIKE '6%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '6%'),'')

--------------------------------------------------------------264----

WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '26%'),'') LIKE '26%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '26%'),'')
-----------------------------------------------------730
WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '73%'),'') LIKE '73%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '73%'),'')









------------------------------------------------------750

WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '75%'),'') LIKE '75%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '75%'),'')







---------------------------------------------------770

WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '77%'),'') LIKE '77%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '77%'),'')






------------------------------760
WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '76%'),'') LIKE '76%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '76%'),'')


-------------------------------------
	----------------------------														   ---------------------------------------
															   ELSE 
 ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '15%'),'') END AS [MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU]




---------------------------------------------


															 --  SUBSTRING(EMU.CODE, 1, 15) [Fatura muhasebe Kodu]
					


---

FROM LG_001_01_STLINE AS L
INNER JOIN LG_001_ITEMS AS S ON S.LOGICALREF=L.STOCKREF
INNER JOIN LG_001_01_INVOICE AS F ON F.LOGICALREF=L.INVOICEREF
INNER JOIN LG_001_CLCARD AS C ON C.LOGICALREF=F.CLIENTREF
LEFT JOIN LG_001_EMUHACC EMU ON EMU.LOGICALREF = L.ACCOUNTREF
WHERE LINETYPE=0 AND F.TRCODE IN (8,9,7,3)----8,9,7,
AND F.CANCELLED=0
AND YEAR(F.DATE_)>2021

UNION ALL

SELECT 
YEAR(F.DATE_) YIL
,MONTH(F.DATE_) AY
,F.DATE_ TARIH
,F.FICHENO FATURA_NO
,C.CODE CARI_KODU
,C.DEFINITION_ CARI_ADI
,S.CODE STOK_KODU
,S.DEFINITION_ STOK_ADI
,S.CYPHCODE
,CASE F.trcode WHEN 3 THEN L.AMOUNT*-1 ELSE L.AMOUNT END MIKTAR
--,L.AMOUNT MIKTAR
,CASE F.trcode WHEN 3 THEN L.PRICE*-1 ELSE L.PRICE END FIYAT
--,L.PRICE FIYAT

--,CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END TUTARESKI
----
,CASE F.trcode WHEN 3 THEN CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END *-1


ELSE CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=7 THEN L.TOTAL-L.VATAMNT ELSE L.TOTAL END END TUTAR



-----


,(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_001_SPECODES WHERE SPECODETYPE=55 AND SPECODE=L.SPECODE2) TUR
,CASE WHEN L.TRCODE=3 THEN 'IADE' ELSE 'SATIS' END FIS_TURU
,(SELECT CODE FROM LG_001_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF) IS_EMRI_N0
,(SELECT NAME FROM LG_001_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF) IS_EMRI_ADI
,l.SPECODE2
--,f.trcode

----
  ,(SELECT        FICHENO
                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFICHE
                               WHERE        LOGICALREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)) [MUH FİŞ NO],

----------------------------------------------
							  --ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

         --                      FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
         --                      WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
         --                                                    (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
         --                                                      FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
         --                                                      WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '6%'),'') [MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU],

		CASE WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '6%'),'') LIKE '6%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '6%'),'')

--------------------------------------------------------------264----

WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '26%'),'') LIKE '26%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '26%'),'')
-----------------------------------------------------730
WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '73%'),'') LIKE '73%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '73%'),'')









------------------------------------------------------750

WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '75%'),'') LIKE '75%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '75%'),'')







---------------------------------------------------770

WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '77%'),'') LIKE '77%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '77%'),'')

------------------------------760
WHEN 
	  ------
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '76%'),'') LIKE '76%' THEN
															   	  
						  ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '76%'),'')




------------------------------
	----------------------------														   ---------------------------------------
															   ELSE 
 ISNULL(  (SELECT       TOP 1 ACCOUNTCODE 

                               FROM            LG_001_01_EMFLINE
                               WHERE        ACCFICHEREF IN
                                                             (SELECT        ACCFICHEREF
                                                               FROM            LG_001_01_INVOICE
                                                               WHERE        LOGICALREF = F.LOGICALREF)AND ACCOUNTCODE LIKE '15%'),'') END AS [MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU]

															  --- SUBSTRING(EMU.CODE, 1, 15) [Fatura muhasebe Kodu]
					
FROM LG_001_01_STLINE AS L
INNER JOIN LG_001_SRVCARD AS S ON S.LOGICALREF=L.STOCKREF
INNER JOIN LG_001_01_INVOICE AS F ON F.LOGICALREF=L.INVOICEREF
INNER JOIN LG_001_CLCARD AS C ON C.LOGICALREF=F.CLIENTREF
LEFT JOIN LG_001_EMUHACC EMU ON EMU.LOGICALREF = L.ACCOUNTREF
WHERE LINETYPE=4 AND F.TRCODE IN (9,8,7,3)--9,8,7,
AND F.CANCELLED=0
AND YEAR(F.DATE_)>2021

UNION ALL

SELECT 
YEAR(F.DATE_) YIL
,MONTH(F.DATE_) AY
,F.DATE_ TARIH
,F.FICHENO FATURA_NO
,C.CODE CARI_KODU
,C.DEFINITION_ CARI_ADI
,S.CODE STOK_KODU
,S.DEFINITION_ STOK_ADI
,S.CYPHCODE
,L.AMOUNT MIKTAR
,L.PRICE FIYAT
,L.PRICE TUTAR
,S.DEFINITION2 TUR
,'TLP' FIS_TURU
,(SELECT CODE FROM LG_001_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF) IS_EMRI_N0
,(SELECT NAME FROM LG_001_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF=L.PROJECTREF) IS_EMRI_ADI
,l.SPECODE

 ,'' [MUH FİŞ NO],

''[MUHASEBE FİŞİ MUHASEBE KODU]
															--   '' [Fatura muhasebe Kodu]

FROM LG_001_01_DEMANDLINE AS L
INNER JOIN LG_001_SRVCARD AS S ON S.LOGICALREF=L.ITEMREF
INNER JOIN LG_001_CLCARD AS C ON C.LOGICALREF=L.CLIENTREF
INNER JOIN LG_001_01_DEMANDFICHE AS F ON F.LOGICALREF=L.DEMANDFICHEREF

WHERE S.CODE LIKE'X 6%'
AND YEAR(F.DATE_)>2021

sample_data.STOK_ADI: SCA124 FROSTWEİSS BF90313 GELCOAT POP-UP TAVAN

sample_data.IS_EMRI_ADI: RESTAR A.Ş 34 DGK 232 BİLGE ULUKAYA UÇAN

sample_data.CARI_ADI: NURGAZ GAZ ARMATÜRLERİ METAL İŞLEME VE ELEKTRİK PAZARLAMA SAN.TİC.LTD.ŞTİ.
EKİM TURİZM TİCARET VE SANAYİ A.Ş.
